content:
🔥 sentrysearch | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Finding specific moments or events within video footage using natural language queries.
✨ Key Features: • Semantic search over video files (mp4) • Uses Gemini Embedding 2 or Qwen3-VL for embeddings • Stores embeddings in ChromaDB • Splits videos into chunks for indexing • Returns trimmed video clips as search results
📖 Summary: SentrySearch enables semantic search over video footage. It allows users to find specific moments within videos by typing descriptive text queries, and the system returns a trimmed clip of the relevant segment.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
